summary: Sweet UltraMatrix recording captures an intense, swirling show highlighted by a mind‑blowing Stella Blue
review: The reviewer describes the performance as a “swirling mass of brothers and sisters dancing super hard,” with the emotional high point coming during a transcendent rendition of Stella Blue. The UltraMatrix source is praised as a “sweet recording” that conveys the intensity of the night, making it an enjoyable listen despite the lack of detailed technical notes.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available; the reviewer expresses strong enthusiasm for both the music (especially Stella Blue) and the recording quality, suggesting a good‑to‑great experience.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a sweet UltraMatrix capture that conveys intensity; no specific flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic, communal vibe throughout with an emotional peak at Stella Blue; the reviewer feels the set list was mind‑blowing.
